creator: marc+fbsdlogstash@sherpaconsulting.org
text:

Fix: 

none known ATM
How-To-Repeat: Install new version of FreeBSD from DVD.   
cd /usr/ports
portsnap fetch;portsnap extract;portsnap fetch;portsnap update
cd sysutils/logstash
make install BATCH=yes MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
